prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical action photograph inside a modern stainless-steel bubble tea shop kitchen, with a dynamic ultra-wide-angle perspective and explosive summer fruit milk tea energy. A young female bubble tea worker is crouching low in the center, reaching one hand dramatically toward the camera in extreme foreground while her other arm stretches upward, wearing a cream polo shirt with green trim, a black apron, loose white pants, white sneakers, and a beige baseball cap; her long dark hair is in two braids, and her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur. Around her, a large transparent plastic cup of orange tropical fruit milk tea with a domed lid and black tapioca pearls floats at the upper left, surrounded by frozen splashes of creamy orange milk tea, scattered black boba pearls, mango cubes, peach slices, passion fruit halves, green grapes, ice cubes, and tiny droplets suspended midair. The floor is wet and reflective with spilled milk tea and pearls, while bright circular ceiling lights, metallic counters, glass panels, and kitchen equipment create a glossy cinematic background. Emphasize sticky, icy, fruit-flavored summer freshness, chaotic zero-gravity motion, high-speed flash photography, crisp droplets, lens distortion from a close 14mm lens, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections, warm golden-orange color grading, sparkling highlights, and commercial beverage-advertising polish. Use a 2:3 vertical composition with the reaching hand huge and slightly motion-blurred in the foreground, the worker centered, and the floating drink and fruit forming an explosive frame around the subject.
